name: Emerson DeltaV DCS API
what_it_does: Emerson DeltaV Distributed Control System (DCS) OPC-UA and REST APIs for process automation and safety instrumented system platform. Enables AI agents to manage real-time process variable and controller output data retrieval from DCS for plant operations monitoring, handle alarm and event data from DeltaV Alarm Management for safety and operations, access batch record and ISA S88 batch process data for pharmaceutical and specialty chemical manufacturing, retrieve DeltaV Insight analytics and performance data for process optimization, manage process historian data integration via DeltaV Continuous Historian, handle safety instrumented system (SIS) demand and trip data from DeltaV SIS Pro, access DeltaV Mobile field operator data for remote monitoring, retrieve calibration and maintenance data from DeltaV workflow, manage predictive maintenance data from DeltaV APM, and integrate DCS data with SCADA, MES, historian, and enterprise systems.
use_cases: Monitoring process variables from plant operations agents
Retrieving batch records from pharmaceutical manufacturing agents
Accessing alarm data from operations center automation agents
Integrating DCS data with MES from production agents
not_for: Discrete manufacturing without continuous process control (refining, chemicals, pharma)
Non-Emerson DCS environments without DeltaV ecosystem investment
Commercial building automation without industrial process and safety context
best_when: A refinery, chemical plant, or pharmaceutical manufacturer using DeltaV wants AI agents to automate process monitoring, batch data retrieval, alarm analytics, predictive maintenance, and MES integration.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: DeltaV controls safety-critical process operations — automated DCS output and setpoint changes without process engineer authorization and safety review violates IEC 61511 safety lifecycle and creates process safety incidents. Pharmaceutical DeltaV batch record automation must comply with FDA 21 CFR Part 11 and GMP requirements. SIS (Safety Instrumented System) data requires PSM-qualified engineer review.

auth.notes: DeltaV uses Windows-integrated and API key authentication. OPC-UA is primary real-time data protocol. REST API (DeltaV Live) for web-based HMI data. No webhooks — polling or OPC-UA subscriptions for event-driven data. On-premise only — no cloud DeltaV deployment. Austin, Texas HQ (Emerson Electric). Emerson acquired Aspentech (2022).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-controller and per-module license
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-controller node license; I/O and function block licensing; lifecycle support annual
pricing.notes: Austin, Texas. Emerson Electric founded 1890. Public (EMR NYSE). $17B+ annual revenue. DeltaV launched 1996. Process automation market leader in chemicals, oil & gas, and pharma. 35,000+ DeltaV system installations globally. Competes with Siemens SIMATIC PCS 7 and Honeywell Experion for DCS market.

performance.rate_limits: OPC-UA subscription based; REST API capacity per DeltaV server

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: DeltaV DCS controls safety-critical processes; all automated control actions require IEC 61511 safety lifecycle compliance and process safety engineer authorization
SIS automation prohibition — DeltaV SIS Pro safety instrumented systems must never be automated for demand or bypass without Safety Instrumented System qualified engineer review
Pharmaceutical GxP — DeltaV in pharma plants is GxP-validated; automated changes to validated systems require change control validation per 21 CFR Part 11 and GMP
OPC-UA primary protocol — DeltaV real-time data access is via OPC-UA (not REST); implement OPC-UA client library for real-time tag access; REST is for web HMI only
On-premise OT network — DeltaV is on dedicated OT network isolated from IT; cloud agent access requires OT/IT firewall DMZ and Emerson-approved connectivity
ISA-88 batch records — pharmaceutical batch records in DeltaV are validated electronic records with 21 CFR Part 11 compliance requirements; automated batch record access must preserve audit trail
agent_readiness.security_notes: Process safety DCS. IEC61511, IEC62443, 21CFR11. Windows auth/API key. On-premise. DCS process control and safety data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Process safety DCS. IEC61511, IEC62443. Windows auth. On-premise. Safety-critical process data.
